programs.title: The Great British Sewing Bee: Wardrobe Staples Week
Inside Dubai: Playground of the Rich
programs.desc: The luxurious life of millionaires and billionaires living in the tax haven of the United Arab Emirates.The creators of the documentary also present profiles of people who serve as their servants.

programs.title: The King's High Street: Inside St James'
programs.desc: St James' Street in London is a popular shopping street famous for its luxury shops.Documentary filmmakers visit them, present the profiles of their owners and introduce their clients.

programs.title: Embarrassing Bodies
programs.desc: Dr. Christian Jessen and his team of doctors help people suffering from rare and very embarrassing diseases.In this series, medics will face really difficult challenges.
